_note: Phrases collected from documented Indian government medicine supply schemes, PMBJP packaging guidelines, and National Health Mission supply documentation. OCR variants are empirically derived from common OCR misreads of these texts.

not_for_sale_keywords.context: Government hospital supply — medicines not to be sold commercially
not_for_sale_keywords.source_reference: Common on NHM and CGHS supply strips; visible on publicly documented government medicine packaging

not_for_sale_keywords.context: Government supply indicator — not for retail sale
not_for_sale_keywords.source_reference: Standard label on Central Government Health Scheme (CGHS) and state health ministry supply strips

not_for_sale_keywords.context: Full form label on centrally procured medicine packs
not_for_sale_keywords.source_reference: Central procurement labels documented in National Health Mission guidelines

not_for_sale_keywords.context: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana — generic pharmacy scheme branded packs
Medicines provided free of charge under government scheme
not_for_sale_keywords.source_reference: Commonly printed on NHM Essential Drug List supplies

not_for_sale_keywords.context: Medicines packaged exclusively for hospital dispensing
not_for_sale_keywords.source_reference: Standard label on institutional bulk packs

not_for_sale_keywords.context: Institutional packs — hospitals and dispensaries only
Abbreviation on Jan Aushadhi branded packs
